title: General Internet Product Manager
content: Traditional product manager roles usually value user insight, requirement definition, roadmap ownership, stakeholder alignment, experiment design, launch execution, metrics review, and tradeoff judgment. Resume tailoring should emphasize problem discovery, prioritization, product decisions, user or business impact, and cross-functional delivery.

title: AI Product Manager
content: AI product manager roles value product judgment plus practical understanding of LLM, RAG, agent workflows, prompt design, evaluation, data feedback loops, and safety boundaries. Resume tailoring should connect AI capability to real user workflows, measurable product outcomes, and responsible human-in-the-loop design.

title: Data Product / BI Product Manager
content: Data product and BI product roles value SQL and analytics fluency, dashboard and metric system design, data governance awareness, data pipeline understanding, business domain modeling, and the ability to turn analysis workflows into productized experiences.

title: Backend Engineer
content: Backend engineering roles value API design, service reliability, database modeling, concurrency, distributed systems, performance optimization, observability, testing, and production ownership. Resume tailoring should show technical depth, scale, reliability incidents handled, and clear ownership.

title: Frontend Engineer
content: Frontend engineering roles value UI architecture, component systems, TypeScript/JavaScript fluency, performance, accessibility, state management, testing, design collaboration, and user interaction quality.

title: Full-stack Engineer
content: Full-stack roles value the ability to move across frontend, backend, data model, API, deployment, and product tradeoffs. Resume tailoring should show end-to-end ownership, ability to ship, and balanced product-engineering judgment.

title: Big Data Engineer
content: Big data engineering roles value distributed processing, batch and streaming pipelines, Spark/Flink/Hadoop ecosystems, data warehouse modeling, scheduling, data quality, resource optimization, reliability, and cost efficiency.

title: Data Analyst / Business Analyst
content: Data analyst roles value SQL, statistical thinking, dashboarding, business diagnosis, metric interpretation, experiment analysis, communication, and the ability to turn ambiguous questions into actionable insight.

title: Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer
content: Data scientist and ML engineer roles value statistical modeling, feature engineering, model training, evaluation, deployment, experiment design, Python, data pipelines, and translating model performance into product or business outcomes.

title: Technical Architect / Tech Lead
content: Architect and tech lead roles value system decomposition, long-term technical direction, scalability, reliability, cross-team influence, technical standards, migration planning, and the ability to make tradeoffs under uncertainty.

title: Solution Architect / Pre-sales Technical Consultant
content: Solution architect roles value customer discovery, mapping business problems to technical solutions, cloud architecture, integration design, proof of concept, stakeholder communication, and commercial awareness.

title: DevOps / SRE / Platform Reliability Engineer
content: DevOps and SRE roles value CI/CD, infrastructure automation, Kubernetes/cloud, observability, incident response, reliability engineering, capacity planning, security basics, and operational excellence.

title: QA / Test Development Engineer
content: QA and test development roles value test strategy, automation, regression prevention, quality metrics, CI integration, exploratory testing, defect analysis, and collaboration with product and engineering.

title: Security / Privacy / Compliance Engineer
content: Security and privacy roles value threat modeling, secure development, vulnerability management, access control, compliance, incident response, privacy regulation, and balancing security with product usability.

title: Project / Program Manager
content: Project and program manager roles value planning, dependency management, stakeholder coordination, risk tracking, delivery governance, communication, milestone control, and cross-team execution.

title: Growth / User Operations / Business Operations
content: Growth and operations roles value funnel diagnosis, lifecycle strategy, campaign operations, user segmentation, content or community operations, data-driven iteration, and collaboration with product, marketing, and sales.
